cover.prompt: A tranquil balcony scene overlooking a cityscape at twilight, with soft, warm lighting illuminating a textured railing and a wide view of the glowing city lights beneath a vast, star-filled sky. The composition emphasizes the peaceful atmosphere and expansive sky, with subtle textures and layered depth to evoke calmness and introspection.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A student finds peace on his balcony, observing an unusual object in the night sky, which leads him to feel a distant presence. His attention is then drawn to a mysterious balloon tied to the railing, revealing a forgotten secret. Releasing the balloon, he returns to his room, feeling a mix of relief and curiosity, resolved to cherish small moments and the night's tranquility.
